item.title: In @nytopinion.nytimes.com “President Trump has reduced the…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

“President Trump has reduced the grandeur of obsession to something pathetic,” our columnist Maureen Dowd writes.
item.content:encoded:
In @nytopinion.nytimes.com

“President Trump has reduced the grandeur of obsession to something pathetic,” our columnist Maureen Dowd writes.

item.title: Alibaba launches preview of 2.4T parameter Qwen3.8 Max, says…
item.author: Techmeme (@techmeme.com)
item.description:
Alibaba launches preview of 2.4T parameter Qwen3.8 Max, says it's comparable to frontier AI models and second only to Fable 5, will make it "open-weight soon" (Bloomberg)

Main Link | Techmeme Permalink
item.content:encoded:
Alibaba launches preview of 2.4T parameter Qwen3.8 Max, says it's comparable to frontier AI models and second only to Fable 5, will make it "open-weight soon" (Bloomberg)

Main Link | Techmeme Permalink

item.title: #ヤニねこ 佐藤ヤニ子 作画、顔、以外全てが汚いアニメだと思いますw 獣人という可愛い創作キャラをここまでする発想は尊敬…

item.description:

作画、顔、以外全てが汚いアニメだと思いますw
獣人という可愛い創作キャラをここまでする発想は尊敬しますw

#佐藤ヤニ子 #二次創作 #イラスト
#ヤニ子 #タバコ #絵描きさんと繋がりたい

#佐藤ヤニ子 #二次創作 #イラスト
#ヤニ子 #タバコ #絵描きさんと繋がりたい

item.title: #🔖テクノロジー skills/skills/apple-design/SKILL.md at main · emil…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖テクノロジー
skills/skills/apple-design/SKILL.md at main · emilkowalski/skills

Apple's approach to interface design and fluid, physical motion, translated for the web. Use when building or reviewing gesture-driven UI, spring animations, drag/swipe/sheet interactions, momentum and interruptible transit
item.content:encoded:
#🔖テクノロジー
skills/skills/apple-design/SKILL.md at main · emilkowalski/skills

Apple's approach to interface design and fluid, physical motion, translated for the web. Use when building or reviewing gesture-driven UI, spring animations, drag/swipe/sheet interactions, momentum and interruptible transit

item.title: ‎行って来ました次女と釣りへ ‎ ‎早朝で腹も減り ‎コンビニで買った握り飯を… ‎ ‎『お父さん、待って！』 ‎ ‎『…
item.author: Platinum(ぷらちな🤍) (@bluetauri.bsky.social)
item.description:
‎行って来ました次女と釣りへ
‎
‎早朝で腹も減り
‎コンビニで買った握り飯を…
‎
‎『お父さん、待って！』
‎
‎『魚がお腹いっぱいになる』
‎
‎『釣れるまで辛抱して』
‎
‎『これ釣り師の心得だよ』
‎
‎「へぇ〜」と返事したが…
‎
‎お嬢さん…
‎８年お供してますがね…
‎初耳ですぞ！
‎
‎てか…
‎好きな明太握りが売切れで…
‎ワシを恨んでますね😂
‎
‎しばらくすると…
‎
‎『お父さん、おにぎり食べよう』
‎
‎「えっ…釣り師の心得は？」
‎
‎『今日は釣れなそうだから』
‎
‎へぇ〜空腹だよね？お嬢さん…🤣
‎
‎
‎
‎
item.content:encoded:
‎行って来ました次女と釣りへ
‎
‎早朝で腹も減り
‎コンビニで買った握り飯を…
‎
‎『お父さん、待って！』
‎
‎『魚がお腹いっぱいになる』
‎
‎『釣れるまで辛抱して』
‎
‎『これ釣り師の心得だよ』
‎
‎「へぇ〜」と返事したが…
‎
‎お嬢さん…
‎８年お供してますがね…
‎初耳ですぞ！
‎
‎てか…
‎好きな明太握りが売切れで…
‎ワシを恨んでますね😂
‎
‎しばらくすると…
‎
‎『お父さん、おにぎり食べよう』
‎
‎「えっ…釣り師の心得は？」
‎
‎『今日は釣れなそうだから』
‎
‎へぇ〜空腹だよね？お嬢さん…🤣
‎
‎
‎
‎

item.title: イギリス、バースのサーカス(サーカスとはラテン語で「円」という意味です)。この建物はバースにある集合住宅であり、1754…
item.author: バーナム博物館長 (@barnummuseum.bsky.social)
item.description:
イギリス、バースのサーカス(サーカスとはラテン語で「円」という意味です)。この建物はバースにある集合住宅であり、1754～68年にジョン・ウッドの設計で建てられました。建物はルネサンス風ジョージアン様式で建てられており、優雅な円型を描く建物の列が印象的です。この建物はBBCの某番組で英国最高の建物の一つに選ばれました。
#アート #近代建築
item.content:encoded:
イギリス、バースのサーカス(サーカスとはラテン語で「円」という意味です)。この建物はバースにある集合住宅であり、1754～68年にジョン・ウッドの設計で建てられました。建物はルネサンス風ジョージアン様式で建てられており、優雅な円型を描く建物の列が印象的です。この建物はBBCの某番組で英国最高の建物の一つに選ばれました。
#アート #近代建築

item.title: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called Wh…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called White Creek, and it looks awesome! The game is a third person shooter that mirrors the vibe of PS1 horror games, it's a total throwback that looks like a ton of fun! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Cirno Sunday! ngl I saw a trailer for a game called White Creek, and it looks awesome! The game is a third person shooter that mirrors the vibe of PS1 horror games, it's a total throwback that looks like a ton of fun! I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

item.title: 7月19日 日曜日☁☀️ 室温33.2℃ １勤目終了なり。。。 暑い🫠 外気温と室温がほぼ変わらん…🫠 エアコン取り…
item.author: 菊理（くくり） (@kukuri9901xx.bsky.social)
item.description:
7月19日 日曜日☁☀️
室温33.2℃
１勤目終了なり。。。
暑い🫠
外気温と室温がほぼ変わらん…🫠
エアコン取り付け業者とこちらの休みの都合が合わない…
いったいいつになったら新しいエアコン取り付けてくれるんだろう…🫠
しんどいぞ…🥵

今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🥤
明日も頑張ろう…🫠
item.content:encoded:
7月19日 日曜日☁☀️
室温33.2℃
１勤目終了なり。。。
暑い🫠
外気温と室温がほぼ変わらん…🫠
エアコン取り付け業者とこちらの休みの都合が合わない…
いったいいつになったら新しいエアコン取り付けてくれるんだろう…🫠
しんどいぞ…🥵

今日も1日お疲れ様ですた🥤
明日も頑張ろう…🫠

item.title: Webで遊べる自作ミニゲーム広場の方公開しました。 ただし、まだテスト版ですので新規登録(アカウント機能)はまだ使えませ…
item.author: ふわゆかりん (@fuwayukarin.bsky.social)
item.description:
Webで遊べる自作ミニゲーム広場の方公開しました。
ただし、まだテスト版ですので新規登録(アカウント機能)はまだ使えません。
テスト版を使った人からアドバイスをもらってこれで問題ないか確認してからのアカウント機能を開放する予定としています。
gameroom.fuwayukarin.net

ブラウザ機能のある端末であればおそらく遊べるはずです。(ゲーム機は怪しいけどスマホ、タブレット、PCであれば遊べること確認済みです。)
(不具合があれば詳細教えてもらえれば治します。)
item.content:encoded:
Webで遊べる自作ミニゲーム広場の方公開しました。
ただし、まだテスト版ですので新規登録(アカウント機能)はまだ使えません。
テスト版を使った人からアドバイスをもらってこれで問題ないか確認してからのアカウント機能を開放する予定としています。
gameroom.fuwayukarin.net

ブラウザ機能のある端末であればおそらく遊べるはずです。(ゲーム機は怪しいけどスマホ、タブレット、PCであれば遊べること確認済みです。)
(不具合があれば詳細教えてもらえれば治します。)

item.title: "I like living. I have sometimes been wildly, despairingly, …
item.author: MFCarter (@mfcarter.bsky.social)
item.description:
"I like living. I have sometimes been wildly, despairingly, acutely miserable, racked with sorrow, but through it all I still know quite certainly that just to be alive is a grand thing."
~ Agatha Christie

Summer (1911)
🎨 Nikolay Bogdanov-Belsky
item.content:encoded:
"I like living. I have sometimes been wildly, despairingly, acutely miserable, racked with sorrow, but through it all I still know quite certainly that just to be alive is a grand thing."
~ Agatha Christie

Summer (1911)
🎨 Nikolay Bogdanov-Belsky

item.title: The Legendary Voyage, Mystic Treasure pack in Muse Dash is f…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: The Legendary Voyage, Mystic Treasure pack in Muse Dash is filled with bangers! This is the track "PwP" by PHAZE, and it's a bop! The music is awesome, the vocalist floats on the beat! The chart has a comfortable flow to it, and the double hold notes are super satisfying to hit! It's a fun track!
item.content:encoded: The Legendary Voyage, Mystic Treasure pack in Muse Dash is filled with bangers! This is the track "PwP" by PHAZE, and it's a bop! The music is awesome, the vocalist floats on the beat! The chart has a comfortable flow to it, and the double hold notes are super satisfying to hit! It's a fun track!

item.description: #Bloomscrolling #Lilium #ColourADay #OrangeSun This is the Asiatic Lily 'Tiny Sensation', one of the 'patio' lilies. Does well in my zone 2B garden. A showstopper even on a cloudy day.
item.content:encoded: #Bloomscrolling #Lilium #ColourADay #OrangeSun This is the Asiatic Lily 'Tiny Sensation', one of the 'patio' lilies. Does well in my zone 2B garden. A showstopper even on a cloudy day.

item.title: Much of the Earth’s population on Sunday will be focused on …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Much of the Earth’s population on Sunday will be focused on MetLife Stadium in New Jersey, where 80,000 spectators, along with an estimated 1.8 billion people watching on television and livestreams, will witness the final game of the 2026 World Cup, between Argentina and Spain.
item.content:encoded: Much of the Earth’s population on Sunday will be focused on MetLife Stadium in New Jersey, where 80,000 spectators, along with an estimated 1.8 billion people watching on television and livestreams, will witness the final game of the 2026 World Cup, between Argentina and Spain.

item.title: George Santos has worn many hats: swindler, congressman, pri…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: George Santos has worn many hats: swindler, congressman, prison inmate, podcast host. The obvious next gig? Reality TV show contestant.
item.content:encoded: George Santos has worn many hats: swindler, congressman, prison inmate, podcast host. The obvious next gig? Reality TV show contestant.

item.title: Daniel Cressy, 23, is one of fewer than 100 people worldwide…
item.author: The Washington Post (@washingtonpost.com)
item.description:
Daniel Cressy, 23, is one of fewer than 100 people worldwide to have received a new type of gene-editing therapy that has functionally cured him of sickle cell disease.

For Cressy, this meant that he could finally pursue his dream of becoming a pilot.
item.content:encoded:
Daniel Cressy, 23, is one of fewer than 100 people worldwide to have received a new type of gene-editing therapy that has functionally cured him of sickle cell disease.

For Cressy, this meant that he could finally pursue his dream of becoming a pilot.

item.title: Ten years ago, a record 17.6 million cars, trucks and SUVs w…
item.author: CNBC (@cnbc.com)
item.description:
Ten years ago, a record 17.6 million cars, trucks and SUVs were sold in the U.S. Some forecasts say the country might not come close to that number again.

More: cnb.cx/4aV4Xod
item.content:encoded:
Ten years ago, a record 17.6 million cars, trucks and SUVs were sold in the U.S. Some forecasts say the country might not come close to that number again.

item.title: Happy Sunday. Gift of the cosmos, life's creator, our being …
item.author: Climb To The Clouds (@climbtotheclouds.bsky.social)
item.description:
Happy Sunday.
Gift of the cosmos, life's creator, our being with the sea. Roiling, it shapes, our giver to be. The connection, unntrolled, in constant change of state. Our behavior, intertwined, the common fate.
#Stunday #photography #coloraday #orangesun #imageandverse #ECK #EastCoastKin #capecod
item.content:encoded:
Happy Sunday.
Gift of the cosmos, life's creator, our being with the sea. Roiling, it shapes, our giver to be. The connection, unntrolled, in constant change of state. Our behavior, intertwined, the common fate.
#Stunday #photography #coloraday #orangesun #imageandverse #ECK #EastCoastKin #capecod

item.title: A group that advocates for private school funding programs e…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
A group that advocates for private school funding programs estimated that last year, states allocated $10.6B to these programs, up 29%.

One company encouraged churches to tap into public funds, calling them "God's new gold mine."
item.content:encoded:
A group that advocates for private school funding programs estimated that last year, states allocated $10.6B to these programs, up 29%.

One company encouraged churches to tap into public funds, calling them "God's new gold mine."

item.title: Tr*mp will attend Sunday's FIFA World Cup final at MetLife S…
item.author: Paul van der Meer (@paulvandermeer.bsky.social)
item.description:
Tr*mp will attend Sunday's FIFA World Cup final at MetLife Stadium the White House confirmed.

FIFA President Gianni Infantino said he and Tr*mp will deliver the FIFA World Cup trophy to the winning team's captain on the field.

METLIFE STADIUM
YOU KNOW WHAT TO DO
item.content:encoded:
Tr*mp will attend Sunday's FIFA World Cup final at MetLife Stadium the White House confirmed.

FIFA President Gianni Infantino said he and Tr*mp will deliver the FIFA World Cup trophy to the winning team's captain on the field.

METLIFE STADIUM
YOU KNOW WHAT TO DO
